commit.subject: LU-19193 osd-zfs: fix blocksize prediction
commit.message:
LU-19193 osd-zfs: fix blocksize prediction

1) non-zero offsets shouldn't this logic to grow blocksize
2) appending writes should increase blocksize larger than
   the chunk being written

and enable sanity/312 back

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/61103
Lustre-commit: d3dde0b63b65fc2a9fbd68534421f7bbb8ba8936

Signed-off-by: Olaf Faaland <faaland1@llnl.gov>
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Iada44aba64ea07862421f7ee452672794732ee32
Reviewed-by: Brian Behlendorf <behlendorf1@llnl.gov>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
